reproduction: Inspect family_birdhouse assembly panels 1-6 at source commit 0bb67a5: the sequence stages carry why provenance, but the reader receives no consistent flush/recess/overhang setup, support/clamp state, or observable per-panel acceptance check.
root_cause: AuthoredStage and ResolvedStage represented order targets and rationale only; the compiler had no bounded fields for one physical setup sentence and one reader check sentence.
